metadata.name: reviewer_mock_20
metadata.purpose: Deterministic reviewer fixture for single-task and 10-20 task artifact checks.
metadata.claim_boundary: Mock tasks exercise the full method, logging, aggregation, and Evaluation artifact pipeline; they are not paper-main ProgramBench evidence.

tasks.docs: Mock task: implement a stdin text normalizer with whitespace-sensitive stdout.
Mock task: implement a line filter with argument parsing and stderr on invalid flags.
Mock task: implement a file copier with overwrite and missing-file behavior.
Mock task: implement a small archive lister with stdout formatting and exit codes.
Mock task: implement a config inspection CLI with precedence rules.
Mock task: implement a JSON field selector with malformed-input errors.
Mock task: implement a local status command with flags and stable exit codes.
Mock task: implement a permission-check reporter with stderr and code-path edge cases.
Mock task: implement a tabular data summarizer with file input and stdout tables.
Mock task: implement a metadata printer with missing-field behavior.
Mock task: implement a todo-list demo CLI with stable formatting.
Mock task: implement a note formatter with argument and stdin modes.
Mock task: implement a tiny expression evaluator with syntax-error stderr.
Mock task: implement a mini template renderer with file and stdin behavior.
Mock task: implement a sorter with duplicate and empty-input behavior.
Mock task: implement a directory summarizer with file side effects.
Mock task: implement a version parser with help text and invalid-input behavior.
Mock task: implement a checksum verifier with file and stderr behavior.
Mock task: implement a CSV previewer with width and row-limit flags.
Mock task: implement a calendar formatter with invalid date errors.
